mapper.insert: insert into task_report_file (task_report_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, user_id, user_nick_name, upload_time, create_time, update_time) values (#{taskReportId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{userId}, #{userNickName}, #{uploadTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into task_report_file (task_report_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, file_size, user_id, user_nick_name, upload_time, create_time, update_time) values
(#{item.taskReportId}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.filePath}, #{item.fileType}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.userId}, #{item.userNickName}, #{item.uploadTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
